title: Ghastling Mod
description: Explore the new mob Ghastling before it gets added
body:
Bring the Nether’s most feared flier under your control! This mod introduces Dried Ghasts, a rare drop from regular Ghasts, which can be revived into tameable Ghastlings—adorable, rideable mini-Ghasts that obey your commands!
Features:

✔ Dried Ghasts – Collect them as rare drops from Ghasts or find them in Nether fortresses.
✔ Revival Mechanic – Pour water on a Dried Ghast to hatch a loyal Ghastling!
✔ Rideable Flying Mount – Soar through the Nether (or Overworld!) on your new pet.
✔ Ghastling Abilities – Slow flight, weak fireball attacks, and immunity to lava.
✔ Growth System – Feed your Ghastling Ghast Tears to strengthen it over time!
Why You’ll Love It:

    Finally, a friendly Ghast! No more dodging fireballs—now you ride them.

    Unique Nether Travel – Fly across lava lakes with ease.

    Cute & Functional – Ghastlings have playful animations but are useful in combat.

Perfect for adventure maps, modpacks, or just taming the Nether’s deadliest creatures!
